issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.ole.com.ar/seleccion/guatemala-amistoso-argentina-bombonera-31-marzo-argelia-italia-fifa_0_Rd00LmDB1d.html](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.ole.com.ar%2Fseleccion%2Fguatemala-amistoso-argentina-bombonera-31-marzo-argelia-italia-fifa_0_Rd00LmDB1d.html) ### Comment > List the website(s) you're having issues with: > > https://www.ole.com.ar/seleccion/guatemala-amistoso-argentina-bombonera-31-marzo-argelia-italia-fifa_0_Rd00LmDB1d.html > > What happens? > > The website ole.com.ar hides news content on Android using AdGuard. > In my phone I use AdGuard 4.12.81 on Android 16 (One UI 8.0) > I use the same subscription filter lists on AdGuard and Firefox > When I visit any page on ole.com.ar, the content of the page is blocked. > I use the same filters on my PC and my phone. > On my PC, there is no problem in Chrome and Firefox > > (In Chrome, uBlock is enabled using the "C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe" --disable-features=ExtensionManifestV2Unsupported,ExtensionManifestV2Disabled trick) > > On my phone: > When AdGuard is ENABLED, on Chrome and Firefox the content is blocked. > When AdGuard is DISABLED, on Chrome the content is visible with ads, and on Firefox the content is visible with uBlockOrigin ENABLED and ads blocked. > > Can anyone help me? > > Screenshot(s): > > Chrome for Android 146.0.7680.119 (Android 16 with Adguard 4.12.81 ENABLED) > > https://i.imgur.com/gPmC9cd.jpeg > > Chrome for Android issue.title: ​[FP] 123865.com - Generic rule in AdGuard Mobile Ads filter
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

Other ad blocker

### AdGuard version

none

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

Microsoft Edge, Firefox

### Which device do you use?

Mobile

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://www.123865.com/s/Hkq5jv-OY8Ah?notoken=1

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter, AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

### Privacy

AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

### Social Widgets

_No response_

### Annoyances

AdGuard Annoyances filter, AdGuard Popups filter, AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter, AdGuard Other Annoyances filter, AdGuard Cookie Notices filter

### Security

Online Malicious URL Blocklist, uBlock Origin – Badware risks

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

AdGuard DNS filter

### Language-specific

AdGuard Chinese filter

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

#### 1. **False Positive**
 - Rules: `123865.com##body > div:not([id]):not([class])` 
 - This [rule](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/8ea18d8f7ff9323cef02026054a59da673f9af49/MobileFilter/sections/specific_web.txt#L90) is too aggressive. It blocks the login or download modal on 123865.com and causes false positives for all `ant-modal-root` classes.
- I suggest changing it to the following rule for better safety:

```Adblock
123865.com##div.ant-modal-root:has(.tuia-modal-wrap)
```

#### 2. **Screenshots**
<details><summary>Screenshot 1:</summary>

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d91d80af-eb5a-4ba1-a01f-f1accc4eb65c)

</details>

labels.name: A: In progress

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

Other ad blocker

### AdGuard version

none

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

Microsoft Edge, Firefox

### Which device do you use?

Mobile

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://www.123865.com/s/Hkq5jv-OY8Ah?notoken=1

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter, AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

### Privacy

AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

### Social Widgets

_No response_

### Annoyances

AdGuard Annoyances filter, AdGuard Popups filter, AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter, AdGuard Other Annoyances filter, AdGuard Cookie Notices filter

### Security

Online Malicious URL Blocklist, uBlock Origin – Badware risks

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

AdGuard DNS filter

### Language-specific

AdGuard Chinese filter

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

#### 1. **False Positive**
 - Rules: `123865.com##body > div:not([id]):not([class])` 
 - This [rule](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/8ea18d8f7ff9323cef02026054a59da673f9af49/MobileFilter/sections/specific_web.txt#L90) is too aggressive. It blocks the login or download modal on 123865.com and causes false positives for all `ant-modal-root` classes.
- I suggest changing it to the following rule for better safety:

```Adblock
123865.com##div.ant-modal-root:has(.tuia-modal-wrap)
```

#### 2. **Screenshots**
<details><summary>Screenshot 1:</summary>

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d91d80af-eb5a-4ba1-a01f-f1accc4eb65c)

</details>

### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

Other ad blocker

### AdGuard version

none

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

Microsoft Edge, Firefox

### Which device do you use?

Mobile

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://www.123865.com/s/Hkq5jv-OY8Ah?notoken=1

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter, AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

### Privacy

AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

### Social Widgets

_No response_

### Annoyances

AdGuard Annoyances filter, AdGuard Popups filter, AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter, AdGuard Other Annoyances filter, AdGuard Cookie Notices filter

### Security

Online Malicious URL Blocklist, uBlock Origin – Badware risks

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

AdGuard DNS filter

### Language-specific

AdGuard Chinese filter

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

#### 1. **False Positive**
 - Rules: `123865.com##body > div:not([id]):not([class])` 
 - This [rule](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/8ea18d8f7ff9323cef02026054a59da673f9af49/MobileFilter/sections/specific_web.txt#L90) is too aggressive. It blocks the login or download modal on 123865.com and causes false positives for all `ant-modal-root` classes.
- I suggest changing it to the following rule for better safety:

```Adblock
123865.com##div.ant-modal-root:has(.tuia-modal-wrap)
```

comment.body: @Alex-302

These classnames are generated by React-supported CSS-in-JS tools and may change with each site update, so I used prefix attribute selectors. 

There is a similar rule in this file, and I want to check if this method is suitable.

issue.title: open.spotify.com
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://open.spotify.com/artist/2VEjtfZuEMFeHHc1Zp5L6R](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fopen.spotify.com%2Fartist%2F2VEjtfZuEMFeHHc1Zp5L6R) ### Comment > Alright so the problem is For a while it was working perfectly fine on my Spotify. Absolutely perfectly until Like a couple of days ago. It would just wouldn't work like it refused to detect the ads. So I tried to restart it for a couple of days didn't work So now I'm reporting it cuz like why is it not working? I have done nothing wrong. To my browsers or anything? No viruses, no nothing and this ad blocker is not working and it's a great ad blocker so I don't understand why it's not working. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/1culxnkkjhtwkwwcksg0wswcc4g8owgikwf57747nw.jpg?nc=1)
### System configuration Information | Value --- | --- AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.2.80 MV3 System version: | `Linux x86_64` Browser: | Oculus Browser Tracking protection: | disabled Filters: | Ad blocking:
AdGuard Base Filters last update: | September 19, 2025 at 09:02 Other extensions used: | `It will not block on Spotify. Anymore It used to block Spotify ads but now it doesn't. I tried restarting it and I tried restarting the page and it won't block the ads anymore for some reason. ` ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=ext&product_version=5.2.80&system_version=Linux+x86_64&manifest_version=3&browser=other&browser_detail=Oculus+Browser&filters=2&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=false&filters_last_update=2025-09-19T09%3A02%3A48)

comment.body:
The comments section uses OpenWeb (Spot.IM) loaded via `https://launcher.spot.im/spot/sp_UtYFX9bh`.

#### Result

Unable to reproduce on Samsung Internet or other browsers — comments load correctly.

However, I was able to reproduce on Firefox. This is caused by Firefox's built-in Enhanced Tracking Protection (ETP), not AdGuard.

`spot.im` is listed in [disconnect.me's Content category](https://github.com/disconnectme/disconnect-tracking-protection/blob/e0867c2/services.json#L12366-L12372), which Firefox blocks in Strict mode and Private Windows.

Adding an AdGuard exception rule has no effect:
```adblock
@@||launcher.spot.im/spot/$script,domain=decider.com

comment.body:
I checked Server 2 on this page (mostplayer.com embed) and couldn't reproduce the problem—the video player loads and plays properly with AdGuard enabled and stealth rules active. 

Could you verify if the issue still happens on your side? If it does, try disabling specific filters like EasyPrivacy or AdGuard Tracking Protection to see if that helps. 

We will reopen the issue if it continues.

comment.body:
Already fixed in https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/commit/c2e5a1c4580234357757258549d3f285c07ff90f
Unfortunately, MV3 extension cannot update filters due to Google policy, so new rules will be available in one of the next extension updates.
Until then, please add following rules to user rules:
```adblock
@@||sdk.privacy-center.org/sdk/$domain=ertflix.gr
@@||sdk.privacy-center.org/*/loader.js$domain=ertflix.gr
ertflix.gr#$#.didomi-host { display: none !important; }
ertflix.gr#$#html > body.didomi-popup-open { overflow: auto !important; }
```

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
 [https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Flogin.kt.com%2Fwamui%2FCusMenuMainMobile.do)
### Comment
> 현상 구현 (android)
> 1. 설정 -> 연결 -> 기타 연결 설정 -> 프라이빗 DNS ->  프라이빗 DNS 공급자 호스트 이름 입력 (dns.adguard-dns.com)
> 2. 안드로이드 마이케이티 앱을 다운로드
> 3. 마이케이티 앱 로그인 실행
> 
> 
> [호출 url]
> 
> https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do
> 
> ▼ 
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/mKTGlobal.js?2026031240819
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/oms.js?version=26011401
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://login.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401
> 
>  
> 
> [오류 발생 url]
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mtargetOffer.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
>  
> 
> log.onmas.kt.com 은 kt.com에 종속된 하위도메인입니다. 
> `support@adguard.com에` 메일을 보내드렸습니다. log.onmas.kt.com에 대한 도메인은 광고로 오탐되고 있으며 제외부탁드립니다.
```
Username: @최형진
```

### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 </summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/3xlbbpn6omkgwosw8k8kwooooko8csc8bsykcbiwok.jpg?nc=1)
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/j59hi2278w8488ckgs80gk88kg4gos8nuw96zk9e9w.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

DNS setup: | Device or router settings

> 현상 구현 (android)
> 1. 설정 -> 연결 -> 기타 연결 설정 -> 프라이빗 DNS ->  프라이빗 DNS 공급자 호스트 이름 입력 (dns.adguard-dns.com)
> 2. 안드로이드 마이케이티 앱을 다운로드
> 3. 마이케이티 앱 로그인 실행
> 
>

> log.onmas.kt.com 은 kt.com에 종속된 하위도메인입니다. 
> `support@adguard.com에` 메일을 보내드렸습니다. log.onmas.kt.com에 대한 도메인은 광고로 오탐되고 있으며 제외부탁드립니다.

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
 [https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Flogin.kt.com%2Fwamui%2FCusMenuMainMobile.do)
### Comment
> 현상 구현 (android)
> 1. 설정 -> 연결 -> 기타 연결 설정 -> 프라이빗 DNS ->  프라이빗 DNS 공급자 호스트 이름 입력 (dns.adguard-dns.com)
> 2. 안드로이드 마이케이티 앱을 다운로드
> 3. 마이케이티 앱 로그인 실행
> 
> 
> [호출 url]
> 
> https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do
> 
> ▼ 
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/mKTGlobal.js?2026031240819
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/oms.js?version=26011401
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://login.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401
> 
>  
> 
> [오류 발생 url]
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mtargetOffer.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
>  
> 
> log.onmas.kt.com 은 kt.com에 종속된 하위도메인입니다. 
> `support@adguard.com에` 메일을 보내드렸습니다. log.onmas.kt.com에 대한 도메인은 광고로 오탐되고 있으며 제외부탁드립니다.
```
Username: @최형진
```

comment.body:
Рекомендуется также установить AdGuard Extra.

---

Известно, что эта проблема решается с помощью AdGuard Extra.

Если вы пользуетесь AdGuard на устройствах Windows, Mac или Android, пожалуйста, убедитесь, что AdGuard Extra включена в настройках приложения.

Если вы используете расширение AdGuard для браузера, рекомендуется также установить AdGuard Extra.

* [Установка на браузеры Chrome, Edge или другие, основанные на Chromium](https://agrd.io/adguard_extra_chrome_release)
* [Установка на Firefox](https://agrd.io/adguard_extra_firefox_release)

comment.body:
@Alex-302 Yes, I already confirm about it and mention reporter in https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/226920#issuecomment-4066133706

> I was able to reproduce the **network error screen** using both methods of enabling AdGuard DNS.
> 
> 1. In the reporter's case: manually setting `dns.adguard-dns.com` in the Android system DNS settings.
> 2. After subscribing to AdGuard for Android and enabling the DNS server in the app settings (the method I initially tested).

issue.title: YouTube live stream ends with infinite loading when Base Filter is active
issue.body: ### Prerequisites - [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml); - [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue; - [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date; - [x] Browser version is up-to-date; - [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue. ### What product do you use? AdGuard Browser Extension ### AdGuard version 5.3.0.23 ### What type of problem have you encountered? Website or app doesn't work properly ### Which browser(s) do you use? Chrome ### Which device do you use? Desktop ### Where is the problem encountered? https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zD7NRlxbB7M ### Ad Blocking AdGuard Base filter ### Privacy _No response_ ### Social Widgets _No response_ ### Annoyances _No response_ ### Security _No response_ ### Other Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion ### DNS filters _No response_ ### Language-specific _No response_ ### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled? _No response_ ### Add your comment and screenshots Summary: After a YouTube live stream ends, the player gets stuck in an infinite loading state when AdGuard Base Filter is enabled. Environment: Browser: Chrome (latest) AdGuard extension for Chrome Active filters: AdGuard Base Filter + User Rules Steps to reproduce: Enable AdGuard Base Filter Open a YouTube live stream Wait for the stream to end The player enters infinite loading and never transitions to the post-stream screen Root cause analysis: Through DevTools investigation, the following has been identified: At the moment the stream ends, YouTube's Service Worker (serviceworker-kevlar-appshell.js) begins a cache update, fetching multiple resources including sw.js_data, live_chat_polymer.js, and player scripts. During this cache update, AdGuard Base Filter's scriptlets interfere with the page re-initialization, preventing the player's end-of-stream handling from completing normally. The following specific rules in AdGuard Base Filter appear to be responsible: ||youtube.com/pagead/ — blocks pagead requests that YouTube requires for post-stream transition ||g.doubleclick.net^ — blocks viewthroughconversion requests issued from youtube.com prevent-setTimeout scriptlet — interferes with timing-dependent stream-end processing set-constant scriptlet targeting ytcfg.data_.EXPERIMENT_FLAGS — causes scheduler.js to throw Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'web_emulated_idle_callback_delay') Workaround currently applied (User Rules): @@/pagead/$domain=youtube.com @@||googleads.g.doubleclick.net/pagead/viewthroughconversion$domain=youtube.com youtube.com#@%#//scriptlet('prevent-setTimeout', '(),a,b)', '5000') www.youtube.com#@%#//scriptlet('prevent-setTimeout', '(),a,b)', '5000') www.youtube.com#@%#//scriptlet('set-constant', 'ytcfg.data_.EXPERIMENT_FLAGS.web_streaming_watch', 'false') The workaround partially mitigates the issue but does not fully resolve it. A proper fix in the Base Filter rules for youtube.com is needed. ### Privacy - [x] I agree to follow this condition

issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: T: Anti Adblock Script
labels.description: The site detects ad blocking

labels.name: NSFW
labels.description: Nudes and porn sites

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

<details>
<summary>Detailed description for iOS users</summary>

1. Install [**Usercripts**](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/userscripts/id1463298887) app
2. Enable **Usercripts** extension in Safari settings
	* iOS 18+: `System settings` => `Apps` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	* iOS 17 and older: `System settings` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	Find **Usercripts**, enable it and allow `On other sites` permission
4. Open the [tinyShield ](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@filteringdev/tinyshield@latest/dist/tinyShield.user.js) userscript URL in browser
5. Press the extensions icon in the address bar of Safari and select Userscripts 
6. Tap to install
7. In opened popup, scroll down and press Install button
8. Done.

</details>

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body:
It blocks `html-load.com`. Please open `Query log`, find the domain and unblock it. Then you should restart the browser or check it in the incognito tab.
Another option is to disable the `OISD Blocklist Big`.

comment.body:
I found the root cause: AdGuard's stealth mode "Hide your Referrer from third-parties" strips the Referer header when the browser loads the mostplayer.com embed (SERVER 2's player). 

The mostplayer.com server validates the incoming Referer header and returns 204 No Content (empty response) when it's missing, resulting in a black player. Adding the rule below resolves the issue. cc @Alex-302 

```adblock
@@||mostplayer.com^$subdocument,stealth=referrer
```

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

<details>
<summary>Detailed description for iOS users</summary>

1. Install [**Usercripts**](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/userscripts/id1463298887) app
2. Enable **Usercripts** extension in Safari settings
	* iOS 18+: `System settings` => `Apps` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	* iOS 17 and older: `System settings` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	Find **Usercripts**, enable it and allow `On other sites` permission
4. Open the [tinyShield ](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@filteringdev/tinyshield@latest/dist/tinyShield.user.js) userscript URL in browser
5. Press the extensions icon in the address bar of Safari and select Userscripts 
6. Tap to install
7. In opened popup, scroll down and press Install button
8. Done.

</details>

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body: Яндекс браузер ограничивает доступ расширениям как к своим, так и бывшим сервисам. Вы можете либо сменить браузер на Chrome / Firefox (любой другой кроме яндекса), либо установить программу вместо расширения и продолжить пользоваться этим браузером.

comment.body:
Адгард обнаруживается целиком:
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/f4d02566-02b5-4d5d-9a11-5e77df0fd0ec)

В результатах поиска возможно не там ищу, в мобильном приложении функции посмотреть журнал фильтрации не нашел, но вроде бы недавняя активность повторяет функционал. Там всё несколько странно: похоже всё скриптом подтягивается, плюс яндекс сам какие то действия совершает по рекламе, и через него остальные источники подтягиваются:

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://lkfl2.nalog.ru/lkfl](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Flkfl2.nalog.ru%2Flkfl)

### Comment
> Добрый день!
> При использовании DNS 94.140.14.14, 94.140.15.15 не работает личный кабинет ФНС России,
> например, https://lkfl2.nalog.ru/lkfl.
> И, соответственно, их мобильное приложение.
> Проверьте, пожалуйста.
> Переключил на 14.140, 14.141 - тоже не работает.
> Пока пришлось вернуться на DNS провайдера.
> 
> Поддержка решить вопрос не смогла: 
> 
> Здравствуйте!
> 
> Со своей стороны блокировки не видим:
>  
> 
> 
> Сообщите об этой проблеме вот так, пожалуйста: https://reports.adguard.com/ru/new_issue.html. Наши разработчики фильтров ещё проверят у себя.
>  
> Сообщите, если есть другие вопросы или нужна помощь 🙏️

issue.body:
Hi

`https://m.youtube.com/api/stats/* is tracking link`

You should block anything ending as `youtube.com/api/stats/*`

I blocked it. Nothing seems to be broken for now

issue.body:
Hi

`https://m.youtube.com/api/stats/* is tracking link`

You should block anything ending as `youtube.com/api/stats/*`

I blocked it. Nothing seems to be broken for now

To reproduce open any video and see logs

Here is my UBO log

issue.body:
Hi

`https://m.youtube.com/api/stats/* is tracking link`

You should block anything ending as `youtube.com/api/stats/*`

I blocked it. Nothing seems to be broken for now

To reproduce open any video and see logs

Here is my UBO log

labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
Hi

`https://m.youtube.com/api/stats/* is tracking link`

You should block anything ending as `youtube.com/api/stats/*`

I blocked it. Nothing seems to be broken for now

To reproduce open any video and see logs

Here is my UBO log

```

comment.body:
@maxelo Hi! This is not reproduced with AdGuard filters on my end. Since you've been using our app, it's better to leave only it. I saw some leftovers. Fixed, the filters will update automatically.
Please do the following;
1. Leave only AdGuard for Android
2. Enable only these filters for now
    ```adblock
    AdGuard Base
    Adguard Mobile Ads
    Adguard Spanish/Portuguese
    ```
3. Wait for the filter update to install automatically, or do it in 2–3 hours manually
4. Open the website.
